title: Clear Vision Color
description: A Crystal PVP texture pack that was created to improve visibility, and item organization.
body: ![Relevant Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6241364959618afc5ef776970fd7f76a7fd13e62.png)A Crystal PVP texturepack that is meant to improve your vision clarity, item management, and motion clarity by displaying less textures on your screen. Shaders such as [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) are reccomended to improve clarity between different block heights.
